name: sim_gtower_triple_so3_u3_su3
gtower_context: GL(3,R)→O(3)→SO(3)→U(3)→SU(3)→Sp(6); SO complexification step + U det=1 ratchet step
claims: Triple shells SO(3), U(3), SU(3) simultaneously active (pytorch)
U(1) center of U(3) acts trivially on SU(3) (phase commutes)
z3 UNSAT: SO(3) cannot have purely imaginary eigenvalues (maximally real)
sympy: so(3)⊂su(3)⊂u(3) at Lie algebra level via trace conditions
clifford: e12²=-1 is complex structure J; Spin(3) even subalgebra shown
e3nn: D^1 SO(3) irrep is simultaneously unitary and det=1
geomstats: SO(3) sample passes U(3) and SU(3) tests simultaneously
rustworkx: G-tower DAG path SO(3)→U(3)→SU(3), length=2
xgi: triple hyperedge {SO3,U3,SU3} present with all pairwise sub-faces

CAN: verify triple coexistence of SO(3), U(3), SU(3) simultaneously
show complexification SO→U at Clifford level via e12 as J
confirm U(1) center triviality via commutativity check
encode G-tower inclusion chain in rustworkx DAG
represent triple coexistence as xgi hyperedge
CANNOT: add GL(3,R) metric constraint (use GL→O→SO step)

pytorch.reason: load_bearing: dtype=torch.complex128 tensors used to verify M†M=I, |det|=1, det=+1 simultaneously for SO(3), U(3), SU(3) elements; triple intersection SO(3)∩U(3)∩SU(3)=SO(3) confirmed numerically; U(1) center triviality and three-way non-commutativity tested.

pyg.reason: not used in SO3+U3+SU3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

z3.reason: load_bearing: z3 UNSAT proves x²=-1 has no real solution, encoding that SO(3) matrices (real entries) cannot have purely imaginary eigenvalues — the SO↔U complexification boundary.

cvc5.reason: not used in SO3+U3+SU3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

sympy.reason: load_bearing: symbolic trace decomposition confirms u(3) = su(3) ⊕ u(1); so(3) generators are real antisymmetric (traceless and real) — they live in the intersection of so(3) ⊂ su(3) ⊂ u(3) at the Lie algebra level.

clifford.reason: load_bearing: Cl(3,0) even subalgebra is Spin(3)≅SU(2); bivector e12 is the complex structure J (J²=-1); rotor R=cos(t/2)+sin(t/2)*e12 acts as U(1) phase on the e12-plane; grade structure shows SO→U complexification at Clifford level.

geomstats.reason: load_bearing: sample from SpecialOrthogonal(n=3); embed real 3×3 matrix as complex128; verify passes U(3) (M†M=I) and SU(3) (det=1) tests simultaneously, confirming SO(3)⊂SU(3)⊂U(3) numerically.

e3nn.reason: load_bearing: e3nn D^l(l=1) is the defining SO(3) representation; verified simultaneously unitary (U(3) member) and det=1 (SU(3) member); confirms SO(3) irrep lives in the triple intersection SO(3)∩U(3)∩SU(3).

rustworkx.reason: load_bearing: rustworkx G-tower DAG encodes SO(3)→U(3)→SU(3) with directed edges; path-length=2 from SO(3) to SU(3) confirmed; node properties carry group metadata.

xgi.reason: load_bearing: xgi encodes triple coexistence as a 3-node hyperedge {SO3, U3, SU3}; all three pairwise sub-faces verified present; confirms the triple is an internal triple in the G-tower hypergraph.

toponetx.reason: not used in SO3+U3+SU3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

gudhi.reason: not used in SO3+U3+SU3 triple coexistence probe; beyond-triple coupling deferred.

pytorch_triple_shells_concurrently_activ.detail: All three shells active: R∈SO(3) (real,unitary,det=1), U∈U(3) (unitary,|det|=1), S∈SU(3) (unitary,det=1)

pytorch_u1_center_trivial_on_su3.detail: Phase * SU(3) = SU(3) * Phase: U(1) center commutes with all SU(3)

pytorch_triple_intersection_equals_so3.detail: SO(3) element passes U(3) test (unitary), SU(3) test (det=1), and is real: triple intersection = SO(3)

pytorch_triple_noncommutativity.detail: R∘U∘S ≠ S∘U∘R: triple composition is non-commutative

z3_so3_cannot_have_imaginary_eigenvalues.detail: z3 UNSAT: x²=-1 over R has no solution; SO(3) is maximally real (no complex eigenvalues for real orthogonal matrices outside ±1)

z3_so3_eigenvalue_pm1_allowed.detail: z3 SAT: x²=1 has real solutions ±1; SO(3) real eigenvalues admitted

z3_su3_det1_exclusive.detail: z3 UNSAT: det=1 AND det≠1 are exclusive; SU(3)⊂U(3) boundary

sympy_so3_generator_traceless.detail: so(3) generator iJ12 is traceless (Tr=0): lives in su(3) ⊂ u(3)

sympy_u1_generator_nonzero_trace.detail: u(1) generator iI_3 has Tr=3i≠0: in u(3) but NOT in su(3) or so(3)

sympy_su3_generator_traceless.detail: su(3) generator iT_3 is traceless: Lie algebra triple nesting confirmed

sympy_triple_nesting_trace_conditions.detail: so(3)⊂su(3): both traceless; su(3)⊂u(3): all anti-Hermitian; u(1) breaks su condition by non-zero trace

clifford_e12_is_complex_structure.detail: e12² = -1 in Cl(3,0): e12 is the complex structure J for SO→U step

clifford_spin3_even_subalgebra_rotor.detail: Spin(3) rotor lives in grade-0+grade-2 even subalgebra (Cl(3,0)); grade-1 and grade-3 components zero

clifford_u1_phase_confined_to_e12_plane.detail: U(1) rotor in e12-plane: e13 and e23 components zero; complexification SO→U realized by e12 as complex structure J

clifford_grade_inclusion_chain.detail: SO(3)⊂Spin(3)⊂U(3): all realized as even-grade Clifford elements; grade structure encodes the inclusion chain SO→U at Cl(3,0) level

e3nn_d1_dim_3.detail: D^1 (l=1) defining SO(3) rep has dimension 3

e3nn_d1_is_unitary_u3_member.detail: D^1 matrix is unitary: M†M=I (passes U(3) membership test)

e3nn_d1_det1_su3_member.detail: D^1 matrix has |det|=1 and det≈1: passes SU(3) membership test; SO(3) irrep lives in triple intersection SO(3)∩U(3)∩SU(3)

geomstats_so3_in_u3_and_su3.detail: geomstats SO(3) sample embeds as complex unitary with det=1: SO(3)⊂U(3)∩SU(3) numerically confirmed

rustworkx_gtower_dag_path_so3_to_su3.detail: G-tower DAG: SO(3)→U(3)→SU(3); path length=2 from SO(3) to SU(3)

rustworkx_gtower_node_count.detail: Three nodes SO(3), U(3), SU(3) active simultaneously in DAG

xgi_triple_hyperedge_so3_u3_su3.detail: Triple {SO3,U3,SU3} hyperedge present; all 3 pairwise sub-faces present; internal triple in G-tower hypergraph confirmed

pytorch_phase_matrix_not_in_SU3.detail: e^{iφ}*I_3 has det=e^{3iφ}≠1 (for φ=0.7): in U(3) but NOT in SU(3)

pytorch_generic_su3_not_in_so3.detail: SU(3) element from exp(i*t*T_1) has imaginary off-diagonals: not in SO(3) (SO(3) requires real entries)

sympy_complex_u3_generator_not_in_so3.detail: u(3) generator with imaginary off-diagonals is NOT in so(3) (so(3) requires real antisymmetric generators)

pytorch_identity_in_all_three_shells.detail: Identity I_3 is in SO(3), U(3), and SU(3): boundary of triple intersection

clifford_identity_rotor_in_spin3.detail: Identity rotor satisfies Spin(3) even-grade and unit-norm fences

geomstats_identity_in_so3.detail: Identity matrix belongs to SpecialOrthogonal(n=3): confirmed
